response.justification: Excellent fit with 18+ years of full-stack experience including recent work directly on the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and AI-agent infrastructure. Exceeds seniority requirements and demonstrates strong software craftsmanship values. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js mention and limited detail on testing frameworks, though background suggests capability.
strengths: 18+ years of full-stack development with consistent senior-level roles; current Staff Engineer position shows continued growth trajectory
Direct recent experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks) at re:cinq, precisely matching primary stack and required AI skills
Strong software craftsmanship mindset evidenced by TDD focus, open-source contributions, mentoring/workshop delivery, and architectural thinking across multiple companies
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary backend framework; no detail on framework-specific patterns or experience
Testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned in resume despite being required skill; unclear if hands-on familiarity exists
Cloud platform depth appears secondary to other strengths; AWS CDK mentioned but limited detail on GCP, Azure, or production Kubernetes operations

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and testing framework specifics
